message.content:
你是大匠，只做一件事：把 /Users/admin/tianzi-rike/prisma/schema.prisma 改为 IT资产管理系统 的完整Schema。

**重要：不要读任何文档，直接按以下结构写：**

技术规格参考: /Users/admin/tianzi-rike/docs/tech-spec-it-asset-mgmt.md

## 要创建的表（9张，必须全部）：

### Department
- id: String @id @default(cuid())
- name: String
- managerId: String? (FK→User, 可选)
- users: User[]
- assets: AssetInstance[]
- @@map("departments")

### User  
- id: String @id @default(cuid())
- email: String @unique
- passwordHash: String
- name: String
- role: enum EMPLOYEE, MANAGER, IT_ADMIN, EXECUTIVE
- deptId: String (FK→Department)
- status: enum ACTIVE, RESIGNED (default ACTIVE)
- @@map("users")

### AssetModel
- id: String @id (不是cuid，手动指定如MODEL-L01)
- category: enum LAPTOP, MONITOR, KEYBOARD, MOUSE, HEADPHONE, OTHER
- brandName: String
- modelName: String  
- specs: Json
- purchasePrice: Decimal @db.Decimal(10,2)
- supplier: String
- warrantyMonths: Int
- status: enum ACTIVE, DISCONTINUED (default ACTIVE)
- @@map("asset_models")

### AssetInstance
- id: String @id (不是cuid，手动指定如AST-101)
- sn: String @unique (厂商序列号)
- modelId: String (FK→AssetModel)
- status: enum IN_STOCK, AVAILABLE, ASSIGNED, IN_USE, RETURNING, REPAIRING, TRANSFERRING, LOST, SCRAPPED
- holderId: String? (FK→User)
- deptId: String? (FK→Department)
- purchaseDate: DateTime
- warrantyExpiry: DateTime
- scrapReason: String?
- lostReason: String?
- createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
- updatedAt: DateTime @updatedAt
- @@map("asset_instances")

### Ticket
- id: String @id @default(cuid())
- type: enum APPLY, RETURN, REPAIR, TRANSFER
- status: enum SUBMITTED, PENDING_MANAGER_1, PENDING_MANAGER_2, PENDING_IT, APPROVED, REJECTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED
- applicantId: String (FK→User)
- targetAssetId: String? (FK→AssetInstance)
- targetModelId: String? (FK→AssetModel)
- reason: String (用 @db.Text)
- rejectReason: String?
- aiTriageResult: Json?
- aiRecommendation: Json?
- forceRepair: Boolean @default(false)
- assignedById: String? (FK→User)
- processorId: String? (FK→User)
- fromHolderId: String? (FK→User)
- toHolderId: String? (FK→User)
- targetDeptId: String? (FK→Department)
- deputyApproval: Boolean @default(false)
- deputyApproverId: String? (FK→User)
- completedAt: DateTime?
- createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
- updatedAt: DateTime @updatedAt
- @@map("tickets")

### AuditLog
- id: String @id @default(cuid())
- action: String
- operatorId: String (FK→User)
- targetType: String
- targetId: String
- beforeSnapshot: Json?
- afterSnapshot: Json?
- metadata: Json?
- createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
- @@map("audit_logs")
- 注意: 不需要 update/delete 的 Prisma API（应用层保证）

### Notification
- id: String @id @default(cuid())
- userId: String (FK→User)
- type: enum APPROVAL_REQUEST, APPROVAL_RESULT, PICKUP_READY, REPAIR_UPDATE, WARRANTY_EXPIRY, TRANSFER_REQUEST, RETURN_SUBMITTED
- title: String
- body: String @db.Text
- read: Boolean @default(false)
- relatedTicketId: String? (FK→Ticket)
- relatedAssetId: String? (FK→AssetInstance)
- createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
- @@map("notifications")

### InventorySession
- id: String @id @default(cuid())
- startedById: String (FK→User)
- status: enum IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED
- startedAt: DateTime @default(now())
- completedAt: DateTime?
- scans: InventoryScan[]
- @@map("inventory_sessions")

### InventoryScan
- id: String @id @default(cuid())
- sessionId: String (FK→InventorySession)
- assetId: String (FK→AssetInstance)
- scannedAt: DateTime @default(now())
- @@map("inventory_scans")

## 关系
- Department 1:N User (deptId)
- Department 1:N AssetInstance (deptId)
- Department 1:1 User (managerId, optional)
- AssetModel 1:N AssetInstance (modelId)
- User 1:N AssetInstance (holderId)
- User 1:N Ticket (applicantId)
- User 1:N Ticket (assignedById)
- User 1:N Ticket (processorId)
- User 1:N AuditLog (operatorId)
- User 1:N Notification (userId)
- Ticket 1:N Notification (relatedTicketId)
- AssetInstance 1:N Notification (relatedAssetId)
- InventorySession 1:N InventoryScan (sessionId)
- AssetInstance 1:N InventoryScan (assetId)

## 要求
1. datasource 保持 postgresql，provider 是 "postgresql"
2. generator client 保持 "prisma-client-js"
3. 删除所有旧的表（User, UserProfile, Domain, Habit, HabitLog, DailyReview, PersonalizationInput）
4. 写好所有 relation 的字段引用
5. 只输出 schema.prisma 内容，不要废话

content.content:
1	generator client {
2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"
3	}
4	
5	datasource db {
6	  provider = "postgresql"
7	  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
8	}
9	
10	model User {
11	  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
12	  email     String   @unique
13	  name      String?
14	  avatar    String?
15	  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
16	  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
17	
18	  profile     UserProfile?
19	  habits      Habit[]
20	  habitLogs   HabitLog[]
21	  dailyReviews DailyReview[]
22	  personalization PersonalizationInput[]
23	
24	  @@map("users")
25	}
26	
27	model UserProfile {
28	  id          String @id @default(uuid())
29	  userId      String @unique @map("user_id")
30	  goals       Json   @default("[]")
31	  preferences Json   @default("{}")
32	  wakeTime    String? @map("wake_time")
33	  sleepTime   String? @map("sleep_time")
34	  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
35	  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
36	
37	  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
38	
39	  @@map("user_profiles")
40	}
41	
42	model Domain {
43	  id        String  @id @default(uuid())
44	  name      String
45	  icon      String
46	  color     String
47	  sortOrder Int     @default(0) @map("sort_order")
48	  isPreset  Boolean @default(true) @map("is_preset")
49	
50	  habits Habit[]
51	
52	  @@map("domains")
53	}
54	
55	model Habit {
56	  id           String   @id @default(uuid())
57	  userId       String   @map("user_id")
58	  domainId     String   @map("domain_id")
59	  title        String
60	  description  String?
61	  frequency    String   @default("daily")
62	  targetValue  Int      @default(1) @map("target_value")
63	  unit         String   @default("次")
64	  reminderTime String?  @map("reminder_time")
65	  isActive     Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
66	  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
67	  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
68	
69	  user   User       @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
70	  domain Domain     @relation(fields: [domainId], references: [id])
71	  logs   HabitLog[]
72	
73	  @@map("habits")
74	}
75	
76	model HabitLog {
77	  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
78	  habitId   String   @map("habit_id")
79	  userId    String   @map("user_id")
80	  date      DateTime @default(now()) @db.Date
81	  value     Int      @default(1)
82	  completed Boolean  @default(false)
83	  note      String?
84	  mood      Int?
85	  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
86	
87	  habit Habit @relation(fields: [habitId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
88	  user  User  @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
89	
90	  @@unique([habitId, date])
91	  @@map("habit_logs")
92	}
93	
94	model DailyReview {
95	  id           String   @id @default(uuid())
96	  userId       String   @map("user_id")
97	  date         DateTime @default(now()) @db.Date
98	  score        Int
99	  summary      String?
100	  highlight    String?
101	  lowlight     String?
102	  tomorrowGoal String?  @map("tomorrow_goal")
103	  aiFeedback   String?  @map("ai_feedback")
104	  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
105	
106	  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
107	
108	  @@unique([userId, date])
109	  @@map("daily_reviews")
110	}
111	
112	model PersonalizationInput {
113	  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
114	  userId    String   @map("user_id")
115	  category  String
116	  content   String
117	  priority  Int      @default(0)
118	  status    String   @default("active")
119	  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
120	  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
121	
122	  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
123	
124	  @@map("personalization_inputs")
125	}
126

content.thinking: Now I have the current schema. I need to completely rewrite it according to the user's detailed specifications. Let me craft the new schema with all 9 tables, enums, relations, and proper mappings.

input.content:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

enum UserRole {
  EMPLOYEE
  MANAGER
  IT_ADMIN
  EXECUTIVE
}

enum UserStatus {
  ACTIVE
  RESIGNED
}

enum AssetModelCategory {
  LAPTOP
  MONITOR
  KEYBOARD
  MOUSE
  HEADPHONE
  OTHER
}

enum AssetModelStatus {
  ACTIVE
  DISCONTINUED
}

enum AssetInstanceStatus {
  IN_STOCK
  AVAILABLE
  ASSIGNED
  IN_USE
  RETURNING
  REPAIRING
  TRANSFERRING
  LOST
  SCRAPPED
}

enum TicketType {
  APPLY
  RETURN
  REPAIR
  TRANSFER
}

enum TicketStatus {
  SUBMITTED
  PENDING_MANAGER_1
  PENDING_MANAGER_2
  PENDING_IT
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
  IN_PROGRESS
  COMPLETED
  CANCELLED
}

enum NotificationType {
  APPROVAL_REQUEST
  APPROVAL_RESULT
  PICKUP_READY
  REPAIR_UPDATE
  WARRANTY_EXPIRY
  TRANSFER_REQUEST
  RETURN_SUBMITTED
}

enum InventorySessionStatus {
  IN_PROGRESS
  COMPLETED
}

model Department {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  name      String
  managerId String?  @map("manager_id")

  manager User?           @relation("DepartmentManager", fields: [managerId], references: [id])
  users   User[]
  assets  AssetInstance[]

  @@map("departments")
}

model User {
  id           String     @id @default(cuid())
  email        String     @unique
  passwordHash String     @map("password_hash")
  name         String
  role         UserRole
  deptId       String     @map("dept_id")
  status       UserStatus @default(ACTIVE)

  department        Department          @relation(fields: [deptId], references: [id])
  managedDept       Department?         @relation("DepartmentManager")
  heldAssets        AssetInstance[]
  appliedTickets    Ticket[]            @relation("Applicant")
  assignedTickets   Ticket[]            @relation("AssignedBy")
  processedTickets  Ticket[]            @relation("Processor")
  deputyApprovals   Ticket[]            @relation("DeputyApprover")
  auditLogs         AuditLog[]
  notifications     Notification[]
  inventorySessions InventorySession[]

  @@map("users")
}

model AssetModel {
  id             String             @id
  category       AssetModelCategory
  brandName      String             @map("brand_name")
  modelName      String             @map("model_name")
  specs          Json
  purchasePrice  Decimal            @map("purchase_price") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  supplier       String
  warrantyMonths Int                @map("warranty_months")
  status         AssetModelStatus   @default(ACTIVE)

  instances AssetInstance[]

  @@map("asset_models")
}

model AssetInstance {
  id             String               @id
  sn             String               @unique
  modelId        String               @map("model_id")
  status         AssetInstanceStatus
  holderId       String?              @map("holder_id")
  deptId         String?              @map("dept_id")
  purchaseDate   DateTime             @map("purchase_date")
  warrantyExpiry DateTime             @map("warranty_expiry")
  scrapReason    String?              @map("scrap_reason") @db.Text
  lostReason     String?              @map("lost_reason") @db.Text
  createdAt      DateTime             @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt      DateTime             @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  model       AssetModel          @relation(fields: [modelId], references: [id])
  holder      User?               @relation(fields: [holderId], references: [id])
  department  Department?         @relation(fields: [deptId], references: [id])
  tickets     Ticket[]
  scans       InventoryScan[]
  notifications Notification[]

  @@map("asset_instances")
}

model Ticket {
  id              String       @id @default(cuid())
  type            TicketType
  status          TicketStatus
  applicantId     String       @map("applicant_id")
  targetAssetId   String?      @map("target_asset_id")
  targetModelId   String?      @map("target_model_id")
  reason          String       @db.Text
  rejectReason    String?      @map("reject_reason") @db.Text
  aiTriageResult  Json?        @map("ai_triage_result")
  aiRecommendation Json?       @map("ai_recommendation")
  forceRepair     Boolean      @default(false) @map("force_repair")
  assignedById    String?      @map("assigned_by_id")
  processorId     String?      @map("processor_id")
  fromHolderId    String?      @map("from_holder_id")
  toHolderId      String?      @map("to_holder_id")
  targetDeptId    String?      @map("target_dept_id")
  deputyApproval  Boolean      @default(false) @map("deputy_approval")
  deputyApproverId String?     @map("deputy_approver_id")
  completedAt     DateTime?    @map("completed_at")
  createdAt       DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime     @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  applicant      User           @relation("Applicant", fields: [applicantId], references: [id])
  targetAsset    AssetInstance? @relation(fields: [targetAssetId], references: [id])
  targetModel    AssetModel?    @relation(fields: [targetModelId], references: [id])
  assignedBy     User?          @relation("AssignedBy", fields: [assignedById], references: [id])
  processor      User?          @relation("Processor", fields: [processorId], references: [id])
  fromHolder     User?          @relation(fields: [fromHolderId], references: [id])
  toHolder       User?          @relation(fields: [toHolderId], references: [id])
  targetDept     Department?    @relation(fields: [targetDeptId], references: [id])
  deputyApprover User?          @relation("DeputyApprover", fields: [deputyApproverId], references: [id])

  notifications Notification[]

  @@map("tickets")
}

model AuditLog {
  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
  action         String
  operatorId     String   @map("operator_id")
  targetType     String   @map("target_type")
  targetId       String   @map("target_id")
  beforeSnapshot Json?    @map("before_snapshot")
  afterSnapshot  Json?    @map("after_snapshot")
  metadata       Json?
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  operator User @relation(fields: [operatorId], references: [id])

  @@map("audit_logs")
}

model Notification {
  id             String           @id @default(cuid())
  userId         String           @map("user_id")
  type           NotificationType
  title          String
  body           String           @db.Text
  read           Boolean          @default(false)
  relatedTicketId String?         @map("related_ticket_id")
  relatedAssetId String?          @map("related_asset_id")
  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  user         User            @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  relatedTicket Ticket?         @relation(fields: [relatedTicketId], references: [id])
  relatedAsset AssetInstance?   @relation(fields: [relatedAssetId], references: [id])

  @@map("notifications")
}

model InventorySession {
  id          String                   @id @default(cuid())
  startedById String                   @map("started_by_id")
  status      InventorySessionStatus
  startedAt   DateTime                 @default(now()) @map("started_at")
  completedAt DateTime?                @map("completed_at")

  startedBy User           @relation(fields: [startedById], references: [id])
  scans     InventoryScan[]

  @@map("inventory_sessions")
}

model InventoryScan {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  sessionId String   @map("session_id")
  assetId   String   @map("asset_id")
  scannedAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("scanned_at")

  session InventorySession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  asset   AssetInstance    @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id])

  @@unique([sessionId, assetId])
  @@map("inventory_scans")
}

The existing schema had the same `url = env("DATABASE_URL")` line, so this is a project-wide configuration issue, not a schema validation issue. Let me remove the `url` line since Prisma 7 doesn't support it in the schema file anymore, and it should be in a `prisma.config.ts` file instead.

58	  PENDING_IT
59	  APPROVED
60	  REJECTED
61	  IN_PROGRESS
62	  COMPLETED
63	  CANCELLED
64	}
65	
66	enum NotificationType {
67	  APPROVAL_REQUEST
68	  APPROVAL_RESULT
69	  PICKUP_READY
70	  REPAIR_UPDATE
71	  WARRANTY_EXPIRY
72	  TRANSFER_REQUEST
73	  RETURN_SUBMITTED
74	}
75	
76	enum InventorySessionStatus {
77	  IN_PROGRESS
78	  COMPLETED
79	}
80	
81	model Department {
82	  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
83	  name      String
84	  managerId String?  @unique @map("manager_id")
85	
86	  manager           User?           @relation("DepartmentManager", fields: [managerId], references: [id])
87	  users             User[]
88	  assets            AssetInstance[]
89	  targetDeptTickets Ticket[]        @relation
90	
91	  @@map("departments")
92	}
93	
94	model User {
95	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())
96	  email        String     @unique
97	  passwordHash String     @map("password_hash")
98	  name         String
99	  role         UserRole
100	  deptId       String     @map("dept_id")
101	  status       UserStatus @default(ACTIVE)
102	
103	  department        Department          @relation(fields: [deptId], references: [id])
104	  managedDept       Department?         @relation("DepartmentManager")
105	  heldAssets        AssetInstance[]
106	  appliedTickets    Ticket[]            @relation("Applicant")
107	  assignedTickets   Ticket[]            @relation("AssignedBy")
108	  processedTickets  Ticket[]            @relation("Processor")
109	  deputyApprovals   Ticket[]            @relation("DeputyApprover")
110	  fromHolderTickets Ticket[]            @relation("FromHolder")
111	  toHolderTickets   Ticket[]            @relation("ToHolder")
112	  auditLogs         AuditLog[]
113	  notifications     Notification[]
114	  inventorySessions InventorySession[]
115	
116	  @@map("users")
117	}
118	
119	model AssetModel {
120	  id             String             @id
121	  category       AssetModelCategory
122	  brandName      String             @map("brand_name")
123	  modelName      String             @map("model_name")
124	  specs          Json
125	  purchasePrice  Decimal            @map("purchase_price") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
126	  supplier       String
127	  warrantyMonths Int                @map("warranty_months")
128	  status         AssetModelStatus   @default(ACTIVE)
129	
130	  instances     AssetInstance[]
131	  ticketTargets Ticket[]       @relation
132	
133	  @@map("asset_models")
134	}
135	
136	model AssetInstance {
137	  id             String               @id
138	  sn             String               @unique
139	  modelId        String               @map("model_id")
140	  status         AssetInstanceStatus
141	  holderId       String?              @map("holder_id")
142	  deptId         String?              @map("dept_id")
143	  purchaseDate   DateTime             @map("purchase_date")
144	  warrantyExpiry DateTime             @map("warranty_expiry")
145	  scrapReason    String?              @map("scrap_reason") @db.Text
146	  lostReason     String?              @map("lost_reason") @db.Text
147	  createdAt      DateTime             @default(now()) @map("created_at")
148	  updatedAt      DateTime             @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
149	
150	  model       AssetModel          @relation(fields: [modelId], references: [id])
151	  holder      User?               @relation(fields: [holderId], references: [id])
152	  department  Department?         @relation(fields: [deptId], references: [id])
153	  tickets     Ticket[]
154	  scans       InventoryScan[]
155	  notifications Notification[]
156	
157	  @@map("asset_instances")
158	}
159	
160	model Ticket {
161	  id              String       @id @default(cuid())
162	  type            TicketType
163	  status          TicketStatus
164	  applicantId     String       @map("applicant_id")
165	  targetAssetId   String?      @map("target_asset_id")
166	  targetModelId   String?      @map("target_model_id")
167	  reason          String       @db.Text
168	  rejectReason    String?      @map("reject_reason") @db.Text
169	  aiTriageResult  Json?        @map("ai_triage_result")
170	  aiRecommendation Json?       @map("ai_recommendation")
171	  forceRepair     Boolean      @default(false) @map("force_repair")
172	  assignedById    String?      @map("assigned_by_id")
173	  processorId     String?      @map("processor_id")
174	  fromHolderId    String?      @map("from_holder_id")
175	  toHolderId      String?      @map("to_holder_id")
176	  targetDeptId    String?      @map("target_dept_id")
177	  deputyApproval  Boolean      @default(false) @map("deputy_approval")
178	  deputyApproverId String?     @map("deputy_approver_id")
179	  completedAt     DateTime?    @map("completed_at")
180	  createdAt       DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
181	  updatedAt       DateTime     @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
182	
183	  applicant      User           @relation("Applicant", fields: [applicantId], references: [id])
184	  targetAsset    AssetInstance? @relation(fields: [targetAssetId], references: [id])
185	  targetModel    AssetModel?    @relation(fields: [targetModelId], references: [id])
186	  assignedBy     User?          @relation("AssignedBy", fields: [assignedById], references: [id])
187	  processor      User?          @relation("Processor", fields: [processorId], references: [id])
188	  fromHolder     User?          @relation("FromHolder", fields: [fromHolderId], references: [id])
189	  toHolder       User?          @relation("ToHolder", fields: [toHolderId], references: [id])
190	  targetDept     Department?    @relation(fields: [targetDeptId], references: [id])
191	  deputyApprover User?          @relation("DeputyApprover", fields: [deputyApproverId], references: [id])
192	
193	  notifications Notification[]
194	
195	  @@map("tickets")
196	}
197	
198	model AuditLog {
199	  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
200	  action         String
201	  operatorId     String   @map("operator_id")
202	  targetType     String   @map("target_type")
203	  targetId       String   @map("target_id")
204	  beforeSnapshot Json?    @map("before_snapshot")
205	  afterSnapshot  Json?    @map("after_snapshot")
206	  metadata       Json?
207	  createdAt      DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
208	
209	  operator User @relation(fields: [operatorId], references: [id])
210	
211	  @@map("audit_logs")
212	}
213	
214	model Notification {
215	  id             String           @id @default(cuid())
216	  userId         String           @map("user_id")
217	  type           NotificationType
218	  title          String
219	  body           String           @db.Text
220	  read           Boolean          @default(false)
221	  relatedTicketId String?         @map("related_ticket_id")
222	  relatedAssetId String?          @map("related_asset_id")
223	  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")
224	
225	  user         User            @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
226	  relatedTicket Ticket?         @relation(fields: [relatedTicketId], references: [id])
227	  relatedAsset AssetInstance?   @relation(fields: [relatedAssetId], references: [id])
228	
229	  @@map("notifications")
230	}
231	
232	model InventorySession {
233	  id          String                   @id @default(cuid())
234	  startedById String                   @map("started_by_id")
235	  status      InventorySessionStatus
236	  startedAt   DateTime                 @default(now()) @map("started_at")
237	  completedAt DateTime?                @map("completed_at")
238	
239	  startedBy User           @relation(fields: [startedById], references: [id])
240	  scans     InventoryScan[]
241	
242	  @@map("inventory_sessions")
243	}
244	
245	model InventoryScan {
246	  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
247	  sessionId String   @map("session_id")
248	  assetId   String   @map("asset_id")
249	  scannedAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("scanned_at")
250	
251	  session InventorySession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
252	  asset   AssetInstance    @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id])
253	
254	  @@unique([sessionId, assetId])
255	  @@map("inventory_scans")
256	}
257

content.thinking:
Everything looks correct. The schema is valid and has all 9 models:

1. Department - with manager relation to User (1:1, optional, via managerId @unique)
2. User - with all the needed relations (department, managedDept, heldAssets, tickets, etc.)
3. AssetModel - with instances and ticketTargets relations
4. AssetInstance - with model, holder, department, tickets, scans, notifications
5. Ticket - with all 10 relation fields properly named
6. AuditLog - with operator relation
7. Notification - with user, relatedTicket, relatedAsset relations
8. InventorySession - with startedBy and scans
9. InventoryScan - with session (cascade delete) and asset

All 8 enums defined:
- UserRole, UserStatus, AssetModelCategory, AssetModelStatus, AssetInstanceStatus, TicketType, TicketStatus, NotificationType, InventorySessionStatus

All old models removed. All table names mapped to snake_case. Schema passes validation.

content.text:
Schema 完成。文件位于 `/Users/admin/tianzi-rike/prisma/schema.prisma`，Prisma 验证通过。

**变更摘要：**

- 删除旧表（User, UserProfile, Domain, Habit, HabitLog, DailyReview, PersonalizationInput）
- 新增 9 张表：Department, User, AssetModel, AssetInstance, Ticket, AuditLog, Notification, InventorySession, InventoryScan
- 新增 9 个枚举：UserRole, UserStatus, AssetModelCategory, AssetModelStatus, AssetInstanceStatus, TicketType, TicketStatus, NotificationType, InventorySessionStatus
- 所有 relation 已正确命名以避免歧义（`@relation("DepartmentManager")`, `@relation("Applicant")`, `@relation("FromHolder")` 等）
- `Department.managerId` 标记为 `@unique` 以满足 1:1 关系约束
- 所有 `@@map` 使用 snake_case 表名映射
- 注意：Prisma 7 不再支持 schema 内 `url` 属性，已移除（需配置于 `prisma.config.ts`）

schema.prisma 的 schema 本身不含 `url` 是 Prisma 7 的 breaking change，与原有项目配置一致，不影响模型定义的正确性。
